settings.text:
Use this text to share information about your brand with your customers.
Describe a product, share announcements, or welcome customers to your store.
Free shipping on all orders within Thailand with a minimum purchase of 1,500 THB.

How to get a special offer

  • Eligible for newly registered customer or registered customer who purchases first order.
  • Newly registered customer: choose to create an account at www.cpschaps.com.
  • First purchase customer: sign in to your account at www.cpschaps.com.
  • Enter the code "CPSNEWREG" at the checkout page.
  • Get discount 500 baht when spend 3,000 baht or more.

Terms and conditions

  • This promotion is valid with a minimum purchase of 1,500 THB per transaction.
  • The free shipping promotion does not apply to items included in the End of Season Sale or Final Sale.
  • By participating in this promotion, you confirm that you have read and agreed to the terms and conditions outlined on our website. For more information, please visit: https://www.cpslabel.com/policies/terms-of-service
  • The company reserves the right to reject any returned or exchanged items, including promotional items, in any circumstance.
  • The offers cannot be exchanged for cash or other items or transferred to others.
  • Find further details about our returns and exchanges policy at: https://www.cpslabel.com/policies/refund-policy
  • For additional information, don't hesitate to contact us at Tel: 02-118-2000 or email: customerservice@jaspal.co.th. Our office hours are Monday through Sunday, 09:00 to 18:00.
